topic: calibration-aware active learning for image classification

scope_classification.label: local_experiment
scope_classification.rationale: The topic can be explored with small simulations, synthetic data, or lightweight local experiments on the Mac.
scope_classification.feasibility_note: This research topic is highly feasible on a MacBook M4, as the 36GB RAM and Apple MPS GPU are more than sufficient for image classification tasks and the iterative training loops of active learning. Suitable public datasets include CIFAR-10 for a quick baseline, STL-10 which provides an unlabeled pool ideal for active learning, and EuroSAT for a more challenging, real-world application. A full experiment, including model training and multiple active learning query rounds, could take approximatel
